summary: Verified all 5 review_request items for scent_profiles admin editing + scent_profile_filter. Backend: 8/8 pytest pass on new test file. Frontend: filter dropdown, 13 scent checkboxes in edit modal, persistence, updated Scents tab text/stats — all verified via Playwright on production URL. One minor i18n issue found: filter dropdown labels display raw translation keys.

ui_bugs.issue: Dropdown options display raw translation keys 'allScentProfiles', 'withScentProfile', 'withoutScentProfile' instead of Bulgarian labels 'Всички профили / С профил / Без профил'. The `t('allScentProfiles') || 'Всички профили'` fallback fails because t() returns the key string (truthy) when missing. Keys are absent from /app/frontend/src/translations/bg.js and en.js.

action_items: Add translation keys to /app/frontend/src/translations/bg.js and en.js: allScentProfiles, withScentProfile, withoutScentProfile (also consider scentProfiles, scentProfilesHint, leaveEmptyForNoDiscount if those are also missing).
critical_code_review_comments: products.py lines 365-373: scent_profile_filter='with' uses {'$exists': True, '$not': {'$in': [[], None]}, '$ne': []} — works but is redundant; '$ne': [] alone would suffice and the '$not': {'$in': [[], None]}' is a more complex pattern. Working correctly though (verified: with+without == total).
products.py line 387-393: $or merging logic correctly handles search + scent_profile_filter combination by promoting both into $and. Verified passing.
ProductsManager.jsx line 264-269: filter dropdown wired correctly to scent_profile_filter query param, useEffect properly resets page to 1 on filter change (line 86).

ProductsManager.jsx line 410-427: 13 scent profile checkboxes implemented correctly with proper add/remove logic. UI hint says 'Избери до 4' but there is NO enforcement of the 4-max in the UI — user can select all 13. If 4-max is a real business rule, add validation. Otherwise update the hint text.
Backend update endpoint correctly persists scent_profiles via Pydantic ProductUpdate model (test_update_scent_profiles_persists passes round-trip).

success_rate.frontend: 100% on functional checks; 1 minor i18n cosmetic issue

test_credentials: Admin: konstantin.kirchev.bs@gmail.com / aS1zX2QwE34xK9 — login works on /auth
seed_data_creation: Test temporarily set scent_profiles=[sweet,fresh,citrus] on one product then restored original value.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verifications performed: (1) GET /api/products/admin/all?scent_profile_filter=with returned only products with non-empty scent_profiles; ?scent_profile_filter=without returned only empty/null; with+without sums to total (math identity verified). (2) PUT /api/products/{id} with scent_profiles body persists and round-trips via GET. (3) /api/admin/scent-migration/status returns db_stats with total_visible (7347), with_profiles (1120), percentage (15.2%). (4) UI: filter-scent-profile dropdown exists with 3 options, applying filter changes table rows. Edit modal opens to show exactly 13 checkboxes labeled Sweet/Fresh/Citrus/Fruity/Floral/Woody/Spicy/Aquatic/Musky/Leather/Tobacco/Oriental/Vanilla. (5) Scents tab info-text contains 'видими продукти БЕЗ профил', button reads 'Анализирай нови/непрофилирани', three stat cards present with correct Bulgarian labels and live values.
rca_of_the_issue: Minor i18n bug: filter dropdown labels display raw keys because the t() function returns the key itself when no translation is found, so the `||` fallback never triggers. Fix: add three keys (allScentProfiles/withScentProfile/withoutScentProfile) to both bg.js and en.js translation files.
